commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Chat Completions function-tool parsing, tool-choice handling, non-stream and streaming tool_calls response mapping, role:tool follow-up prompt handling, docs, changelog, and Gateway tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows /v1/chat/completions does not carry tools/tool_choice/tool_call_id/tool_calls and always maps normal responses to finish_reason "stop", while the PR adds focused tests for those missing paths.
